# Video Stereo Repositories

This folder is the local ARGOS staging area for video-stereo upstream repositories.

The actual repository payloads are ignored by Git. Current local entries:

- `TemporalStereo` -> `/home/pampaj/Desktop/stereo/TemporalStereo`
- `Temporally-Consistent-Stereo-Matching` -> `/home/pampaj/Desktop/stereo/Temporally-Consistent-Stereo-Matching`
- `stereoanyvideo` -> `/home/pampaj/Desktop/stereo/stereoanyvideo`
- `dynamic_stereo` cloned from `https://github.com/facebookresearch/dynamic_stereo`
- `bidastereo` cloned from `https://github.com/TomTomTommi/bidastereo`

Scouting report and smoke-test outputs live in:

`/home/pampaj/Desktop/ARGOS/results/video_stereo_repos/`
